objective: Make conversation plans, canonical work, generated context, repository files, and the Forge interface operate as one recoverable anti-spaghetti continuity system.
next_action: Await direct owner review in the built-in Forge viewport; do not infer or submit an observation on the owner's behalf.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized local Forge implementation only; no inferred approvals, remote publishing, spending, credentials, engine selection, external execution, or owner observation submission.
context_health: Green: the coherence package is complete, the full Forge gate passes, the real ledger migrated additively, and local Git now supplies an independent reviewed recovery baseline.
unresolved_risks: The repository has no existing commit baseline.
Generic conversation candidates can flood owner review.
Duplicated status and stale navigation can misroute a context-limited worker.
The independent F5 owner-observation gate must remain untouched.
verification_plan: test typed record deduplication and replay
test authority boundaries and stale revisions
resume_after: Resume the independent F5 owner-observation gate only after this package closes or if the owner deliberately submits an observation in the built-in viewport.
verification_receipts: UI TypeScript and Vite build pass
typed intake is idempotent and authority-free
unified snapshot is deterministic and read-only
Atlas milestone status derives from master program
real ledger integrity ok with 223 typed records: 25 plans, 8 decisions, 1 research, 189 tasks
transition: owner-approved coherence plan -> verified recovery and role baseline -> typed additive intake -> unified generated projection -> real-ledger migration -> full verification -> local Git baseline -> complete package
